title: I'll Be Here - Warner Bros. UK

sentences.en: Oh, thanks. But you don't have to. I can open the door. Sure.
sentences.ko: 아, 고마워. 하지만 괜찮아. 내가 문 열 수 있어. 좋아.

sentences.en: Okay, so this shouldn't take more than an hour, but if you can't stay here, I'll call Becky,
sentences.ko: 알겠어, 이건 한 시간도 안 걸릴 거야. 하지만 여기 있을 수 없으면 베키한테 전화할게,

sentences.en: and then she'll find you, and then you can just pull up. All right. I'll be here.
sentences.ko: 그러면 그녀가 너를 찾아서 그냥 오면 돼. 알겠어. 나는 여기 있을게.

sentences.en: I think I forgot to eat today. Should I pick you up some sushi?
sentences.ko: 오늘 밥 먹는 걸 깜빡한 것 같아. 초밥 좀 사다 줄까?

sentences.en: No. I eat too much mercury. I'll be fine. I'm good.
sentences.ko: 아니. 수은을 너무 많이 먹어. 괜찮아. 나는 괜찮아.

sentences.en: I'm actually kind of nauseous, so...
